caption: A person's hands are seen mixing a large quantity of beige, crumbly food ingredients inside a wide metal bowl. The bowl sits on a light-colored wooden surface. Next to the bowl, there is a small white plate and a small red bowl, both containing portions of the same crumbly mixture. In the upper-left corner of the scene, the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" is displayed alongside a logo. As the sequence progresses, the person uses their hands to stir and fold the ingredients together, with the mixture shifting and clumping within the metal bowl. The camera remains in a static close-up shot, focusing on the manual preparation of the food. The background is a plain, light-colored wall.
